steps.title: Track the central action
steps.content: The passage centers on Mariana waking suddenly to a flashing news report and wondering when she had fallen asleep. It then contrasts her usual quick, violent sleep with how she drifted into sleep slowly the previous night. The whole paragraph stays on that moment.

steps.title: Reject minor details
steps.content: B invents a habit of watching news before bed, C overstates the weather detail, and D invents future plans. The main topic combines Mariana's awakening with how she fell asleep earlier. The answer is A.
